# Israel Junior Open 2027

> The Israel Junior Open 2027 is an ESF (European Squash Federation) Junior Circuit Bronze squash tournament for junior boys and girls (Under 11 to Under 19), held 14-16 May 2027 in Tel Aviv, Israel, and organised by the Israel Squash Association. This is the official information and logistics website. Registration, draws and results are handled on the official ESF event page.

## Key facts

- Event: Israel Junior Open 2027 — ESF Junior Circuit Bronze
- Sport: Squash (junior / youth)
- Dates: 14-16 May 2027 (Friday to Sunday), 3 competition days
- City: Tel Aviv, Israel
- Venue: Migdali Tel Aviv Country Club, Nahalat Yitzhak St 18, Tel Aviv-Yafo, Israel — 4 courts with a glass back wall
- Categories: Boys and Girls Under 11, Under 13, Under 15, Under 17, Under 19 (10 categories in total)
- Match format: best of 5 games, point-a-rally (PAR) scoring to 11 points, win by 2 clear points
- Ball: WSF-approved double yellow dot (U15/U17/U19); single yellow dot (U11/U13)
- Entry fee: 65 EUR per player (includes the ESF ranking fee)
- Entry deadline: 1 May 2027
- Official hotel: Crowne Plaza Tel Aviv (5-star), a 5-minute walk from the courts
- Organiser: Israel Squash Association (squashisrael.co.il)
- Tournament Director: Raz Fridman (razfridman1999@gmail.com, +972 52 617 1419)
- Entries: submitted through the official ESF Junior Circuit entry system (registration not yet open as of mid-2026)
- International players: most nationalities need no visa for a short tourist stay but must obtain an approved ETA-IL online before flying to Israel

## Pages

- [Home](https://israeljunioropen.pages.dev/): event overview, dates, countdown and quick links
- [Tournament Info](https://israeljunioropen.pages.dev/tournament): dates, age categories, match format and scoring, ESF ranking, officials
- [First Match Times](https://israeljunioropen.pages.dev/schedule): published about 4 days before the event
- [Venue](https://israeljunioropen.pages.dev/venue): Migdali Tel Aviv Country Club facilities, address and map
- [Packages & Pricing](https://israeljunioropen.pages.dev/packages): hotel, meal and entry packages
- [Travel & Arrival](https://israeljunioropen.pages.dev/travel): airport, train, hotel, and entry-to-Israel / ETA-IL visa guidance
- [About Tel Aviv](https://israeljunioropen.pages.dev/telaviv): weather, attractions and practical tips
- [Player Info & FAQ](https://israeljunioropen.pages.dev/playerinfo): equipment, ball, dress code, eye protection, conduct, FAQ
- [Gallery](https://israeljunioropen.pages.dev/gallery): photos published after the event
- [Sponsors & Partners](https://israeljunioropen.pages.dev/sponsors)
- [Contact](https://israeljunioropen.pages.dev/contact): organiser contact and how to enter

## External links

- Official ESF event page (entries, draws, results): https://europeansquash.com/event/israel-junior-open-2027/
- Israel Squash Association: https://www.squashisrael.co.il/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/israeljunioropen/
